description: Required Zone 1 North Star keys that ALL bots expect. Users fill these during onboarding.

required.label: Company Mission
required.placeholder: We help small businesses automate their data pipelines.
required.description: Your company's mission statement. Bots use this to align their work with your goals.

required.label: Primary Industry
required.description: Your primary industry. Bots tailor their analysis and recommendations to your sector.

required.label: Business Stage
required.description: Your current team size and stage. Bots adjust formality and detail level accordingly.

required.label: Top 3 Quarterly Priorities
required.placeholder:
1. Launch v2 product
2. Reduce churn to <5%
3. Close Series A
required.description: Your top priorities this quarter. Bots prioritize findings that relate to these goals.

optional.label: Technology Stack
optional.description: Primary technologies in use. SRE and Data Engineer bots use this for context.

optional.label: SLA Targets
optional.description: Service level targets. SRE bot monitors against these thresholds.

optional.label: Budget Constraints
optional.description: Budget limits. Accountant and Marketing bots factor these into recommendations.

optional.label: Compliance Requirements
optional.placeholder: GDPR, SOC2 Type II, PCI DSS Level 1
optional.description: Regulatory requirements. Legal & Compliance bot monitors against these frameworks.
